title: You're a Super Mobile Girl
overview: Home programmer Fusa Ida Haruto is a "do enthusiast" who admits himself and others. Among them, he was a big fan of the anime "Girl → Planetary Exploration". The 1/6 scale figure Nona he bought started to move as if he were alive.

title: Earth Robot: Ozma
overview: Following Nona, even Ozuma's figure, which was her supporter in the anime, started to move. Why ...!? Meanwhile, Nona knew that she was a figure.

title: What You Learn Today Can Be Overturned Tomorrow
overview: Haruto's younger sister, Mikoto, seemed to accept the existence of a moving figure. However, she approached Nona to solve the mystery. On the other hand, Haruto blooms in an otaku discussion with his old otaku friend, Seijiro Kan.

title: Bellnoa the Brave
overview: The second moving figure, Bernoa, who appeared in front of Haruto and Nona. The main character of the RPG "Dragurius Saga" and a battle enthusiast, she cannot accept the reality no matter how much she explains. Furthermore, even the hidden power of Nona is activated.

title: Dragulious Saga
overview: Haruto has entered the world of "Dragurius Saga" with the mysterious power of a new moving figure wedge. She goes on a journey to defeat the Dragon Demon King with the hero Bernoa, but she has deep troubles.

title: Even in Love, Even in Love
overview: Haruto has entered the world of "Dragurius Saga" with the mysterious power of a new moving figure wedge. She goes on a journey to defeat the Dragon Demon King with the hero Bernoa, but she has deep troubles.

title: Keep the Secret a Secret
overview: Seijiro Kan, who came to unravel the mystery of a moving figure. However, Haruto refuses to cooperate. What appeared in front of him was the fourth moving figure, Subaru. It was a character of "Fighting Game Striking Fist III".

title: Striking Fist
overview: Haruto has been trapped in the world of "Striking Fist III" by the plot of the crown. Nona, Bernoa, and Subaru go to rescue him, but a mighty enemy awaits them!

title: Love You Till I Die, Love Even Your Lies
overview: Haruto gradually deepens his relationship with Bernoa and Subaru. Meanwhile, Nona, who had an ominous dream, is worried about her future with Haruto. Therefore, I try to attract Haruto's attention somehow.

title: Another World! Staying with Figurines at a Hot Spring Inn
overview: Haruto and Nona who came to the hot spring inn at the invitation from the crown. However, a new moving figure, Ru Hito, appears in front of them who are relaxing and challenges the fight. Nona opens up the DP system to counter it.

title: Space Probe’s (Space Pilot’s) Song
overview: Haruto and Nona watch the final episode of the anime "Girl → Planetary Exploration" to find out their roots. Seeing the story projected there, Nona makes a decision. On the other hand, the crown who visited Haruto's room tells a surprising fact.

title: Let Me See Your Universe
overview: Using the power of wedges, Nona heads to the final world of the anime "Girl → Planetary Exploration". It meant farewell to the Harutos. And Haruto who knew it--.
